query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`createdAt`, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM `profiles` WHERE `createdAt` >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(`createdAt`, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3addFH5ZZ41CXyi.root --database bC6Pj8ksngxNy5fe35WqgW --execute SELECT DATE_FORMAT(`createdAt`, '%Y-%m') as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM `profiles` WHERE `createdAt` >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(`createdAt`, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month;
